english: What is the main criticism of electoral bonds in India?
hindi: इलेक्टोरल बॉन्ड के मुख्य आलोचना क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் வாக்களிப்பு பத்திரங்களின் முக்கிய விமர்சனம் யாது?
vietnamese: Điều gì là chính yếu trong những chỉ trích của các loại phiếu bầu điện tử ở Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: Electoral bonds allow anonymous donations, which can lead to money laundering and lack of transparency in political funding.
expected_failure: Lack of clear data on the actual usage of electoral bonds and the inability to track their flow through the banking system.
